title: Mob Tweaks
description: Minor tweaks to the appearance of some mobs
body:
![Cover Image](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/13470e873b86df43afb9aa094218122f25e57d59.png)

Mob Tweaks is a resource pack designed to slightly tweak some of the mobs withtin Minecraft. Many of these tweaks are to address inconsistencies that have bugged me for many years, such as Creepers no longer blending into their surroundings, or Illagers not matching their Witch and Villager counterparts.

_[Creeper hiding amongst the foliage]_
![Creeper Hiding](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/5a043b7c2dc5bbbbc4073040821df7fc0eb171b8.png)

A version that only changes the Creeper texture is available for download, look for the **[Leafy Creepers]** tag.

_[Illager + Villager Consistency]_
![Illager Consistency](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/3f58001b34bffda555a7bbb15d8b0850a641f9e1.png)

**Feedback is welcome and I will try to keep this pack updated to the current version of Minecraft and tweak more mobs as ideas come.**
